00-the-fool.png: A young man in a patterned green, orange, and yellow tunic and yellow boots stands on a brown rocky cliff, looking up, holding a white rose and a staff with a pouch, while a small white dog jumps at his feet, set against a yellow sky with a radiating sun, an "O" symbol, and distant blue and white mountains.
01-the-magician.png: A male figure in a red robe and white tunic stands centrally, holding a white wand aloft and pointing down with his left hand, with a gold cup, pentacle, and sword on a brown table before him, against a yellow background adorned with red roses, green leaves, and the Roman numeral I at the top, an infinity symbol above his head, and white lilies and more red roses blooming at his feet.
02-the-high-priestess.png: A woman in a blue robe with a white cross on her chest and a horned headdress sits on a grey block, holding a scroll marked 'TORA', with a yellow crescent moon at her feet, positioned between a black pillar marked 'B' and a white pillar marked 'J', in front of a blue and green patterned curtain with pomegranates.
03-the-empress.png: A woman with blonde hair, crowned with stars and wearing a pearl necklace and a white pomegranate-patterned dress, sits on a red throne with a patterned pillow, holding a scepter, next to a heart-shaped shield with a Venus symbol, all positioned before a landscape of green trees, a waterfall, a yellow sky, and foregrounded by golden grain.
04-the-emperor.png: A bearded man wearing a golden crown, red-orange robes, and grey armored boots sits centrally on a grey throne adorned with ram heads, holding a golden ankh-scepter in his right hand and a golden orb in his left, against an orange-yellow striped background with barren yellow mountains.
05-the-hierophant.png: A figure wearing a yellow triple crown and red and white robes sits centrally on an ornate grey throne, raising one hand and holding a golden triple cross scepter, flanked by two grey ornate pillars and two smaller figures kneeling on a patterned floor displaying crossed gold keys.
06-the-lovers.png: A winged angel with red feathers and fiery hair, wearing a purple robe, hovers beneath a radiating yellow sun, extending its hands over a nude woman beside an apple tree wrapped with a green snake and a nude man beside a tree with orange flame-like leaves, all on green ground before a brown mountain and blue sky, with white clouds floating between the human figures.
07-the-chariot.png: A central armored figure with a star crown and scepter sits in a grey chariot, adorned with a blue star-patterned canopy and winged emblem, pulled by a black and a white sphinx, with distant cityscapes and green ground under a yellow sky.
08-strength.png: A woman in a white robe, adorned with a floral wreath and garland, and an infinity symbol above her head, stands with a red-orange lion whose mouth she gently holds, against a landscape of green ground, blue mountains, and a bright yellow sky.
09-the-hermit.png: A grey-robed, hooded old man with a white beard stands centrally on a white snowy ground against a pale blue background, holding a glowing yellow lantern in his raised left hand and a long yellow staff in his right.
10-wheel-of-fortune.png: A large golden wheel with black symbols and spokes dominates the center, supporting a blue sphinx holding a sword at its apex, a red canine-headed figure on its right, and a yellow snake on its left, while four golden winged creatures—a humanoid, an eagle, an ox, and a lion—each holding an open book, float on grey clouds in the corners against a light blue sky.
11-justice.png: A crowned figure wearing a red robe with green and gold trim sits centrally on a grey stone throne, holding an upright blue sword in their left hand and golden scales in their right, flanked by two grey pillars draped with a maroon curtain against a bright yellow background.
12-the-hanged-man.png: A man hangs upside down by his left foot, tied by a rope to a brown wooden T-shaped gallows with green leaves, wearing red pants and a blue tunic, with his right leg crossed behind the left and a golden halo around his head, set against a plain white background.
13-death.png: A skeletal knight in black armor with a red plume rides a white horse adorned with skulls, holding a black flag featuring a white rose and the Roman numeral 'XIII'; a golden-crowned king lies on the green ground, while a yellow-robed bishop, a white-robed woman, and a child in blue kneel before the horse, all set against a blue river, distant grey mountains, and a yellow sunrise behind a grey castle.
14-temperance.png: A brown-winged angel in a white robe with a yellow triangular emblem and a sunburst halo stands with one foot in blue water and one on green land, pouring blue liquid between two golden cups, with a yellow sun over mountains on the left and yellow irises among green foliage on the right.
15-the-devil.png: A large, yellow-skinned, horned, and winged figure with a white inverted pentagram on its head sits centrally on a black pedestal, flanked by two smaller nude, yellow-skinned figures with red horns and silver chains, one holding red grapes and the other a flaming torch, all set against a black background.
16-the-tower.png: A grey tower, ablaze with orange flames and hit by a yellow lightning bolt, features a golden crown falling from its top and two figures, dressed in red, blue, and yellow, plummeting headfirst against a dark, cloudy sky with scattered yellow debris.
17-the-star.png: A naked blonde woman kneels by a body of water, pouring water from two tan pitchers, one into a rippling pool and the other onto green ground, under a blue sky featuring one large yellow star and seven smaller white stars, with distant purple mountains and a small brown bird on a green tree.
18-the-moon.png: A large yellow sun/moon with a profile face emits yellow droplets in a blue sky above two gray towers, a green landscape with a howling brown dog and a snarling yellow wolf, and a red crayfish emerging from blue water.
19-the-sun.png: The card features a large yellow sun with a face radiating in a blue sky above a nude child, adorned with a feather, riding a white horse over a grey wall, flanked by sunflowers and a flowing orange banner, with "XIX" at the top and "THE SUN" at the bottom.
20-judgement.png: An angel with yellow hair and red wings, emerging from clouds against a blue sky, blows a golden trumpet from which a white banner with a red cross hangs, while a man, woman, and child, along with other nude figures, rise from open grey tombs in a blue-watered landscape with distant mountains.
21-the-world.png: A nude dancer holding two white wands and draped in purple cloth is centered within a green oval wreath tied with red ribbons, set against a light blue background, and flanked by a human head, an eagle, a bull, and a lion on white clouds in the four corners.
22-ace-of-wands.png: A white hand emerges from a grey cloud, holding a brown wand with green leaves and falling yellow leaves, above a landscape featuring green hills, a blue river, distant purple mountains, and a white castle on a hill.
23-two-of-wands.png: A man in a red cap and brown robe stands on a stone balcony adorned with a rose and lily crest, holding a small green and orange globe in one hand and a tall brown wand in the other, with another identical wand standing beside him, all overlooking a landscape of blue water, green hills, purple mountains, and a distant red-roofed building.
24-three-of-wands.png: A figure in a red robe with a green tunic and blue sleeve stands with their back to the viewer on a green and brown rocky outcrop, holding one of three upright brown wands, gazing at a yellow sky above a distant tan sea with dark boats and faint purple mountains.
25-four-of-wands.png: Four tall wands, adorned with a green and red floral garland between the central two, frame a yellow-skied scene featuring two main figures in blue and red robes raising bouquets before a grey castle with red-roofed towers, while smaller figures appear in the distant left.
26-five-of-wands.png: Five men in varied colorful medieval garb clash five brown, leafy wands on an earthy landscape under a blue sky, forming a central, energetic composition.
27-six-of-wands.png: A man wearing a green wreath on his head and a reddish cloak rides a white horse, holding a staff adorned with a green wreath and red ribbon; he is accompanied by five other staffs with green leaves and partially visible figures behind him, all against a blue sky and green ground with the Roman numeral VI at the top.
28-seven-of-wands.png: A man in a green tunic and yellow-orange pants stands on green hilly ground under a light blue sky, holding a large brown staff diagonally across his body, with six other brown staves with green leaves planted around him, and the Roman numeral VII at the top.
29-eight-of-wands.png: Eight golden wands adorned with small green leaves diagonally traverse a blue sky above a green landscape containing a winding river, a hill with a small castle, and the Roman numeral "VIII" at the top.
30-nine-of-wands.png: A man wearing a white head bandage, an orange tunic, and yellow boots stands centrally, holding a brown staff, positioned in front of a barrier of eight upright brown wands with green leaves, against a background of blue sky and green hills.
31-ten-of-wands.png: A figure wearing an orange tunic and yellow pants is bent forward, walking right, carrying a large bundle of ten brown wands with green leaves on a yellow path, against a blue sky with green bushes and distant brown buildings.
32-page-of-wands.png: A fair-skinned figure with curly blonde hair wears a yellow patterned tunic, orange leggings, yellow boots, and a white hat with a red feather, standing in a barren orange landscape under a blue sky while holding a tall, leafy brown wand vertically and gazing upwards at it.
33-knight-of-wands.png: A knight in silver armor with a yellow patterned surcoat and red plume rides a rearing brown horse, holding a leafy brown wand, against a light blue sky over a desert ground with three small, stylized brown hills.
34-queen-of-wands.png: A crowned queen in a yellow robe and white cloak sits centrally on a throne decorated with red lions and sunflowers, holding a leafy wand and a large sunflower, with a small black cat seated at her feet, against a light blue sky and yellow mountainous landscape.
35-king-of-wands.png: A crowned king, wearing red robes and a green mantle, sits on a yellow throne adorned with black lions and salamanders, holding a leafy staff, against a light blue background, with a small black lizard on the white platform below.
36-ace-of-cups.png: A white hand emerges from a cloud on the right, holding a golden chalice from which five streams of blue water pour into a blue pool filled with green lily pads and pink lotus flowers, while a white dove with a white cross-marked host descends from above the chalice.
37-two-of-cups.png: Two figures, a woman wearing a green wreath and a white and blue robe, and a man wearing a red wreath and a spotted yellow tunic, stand facing each other on yellow ground, each holding a golden cup, with a caduceus topped by a red winged lion head positioned centrally between and above the cups, all set against a backdrop of green hills with red-roofed buildings under a light blue sky, with the Roman numeral 'II' centered at the top.
38-three-of-cups.png: Three women in red, white, and yellow robes raise three golden cups against a blue sky, surrounded by green foliage, orange pomegranates, grapes, and a pumpkin on yellow ground.
39-four-of-cups.png: A person with crossed arms sits cross-legged under a large green tree on a grassy hill, wearing green, red, and blue clothing, as three golden cups rest on the ground and a hand emerges from a white cloud in the blue sky to offer a fourth golden cup.
40-five-of-cups.png: A dark cloaked figure stands with bowed head on yellow-green ground, surrounded by three overturned golden cups spilling red and green liquid on the left and two upright golden cups on the right, with a background displaying a blue river, white bridge, tan ruined building, green hills, and a grey sky, beneath a Roman numeral 'V'.
41-six-of-cups.png: The card depicts a boy in a red hood and blue tunic passing a golden cup with a white flower to a girl in a spotted yellow dress and orange hood, surrounded by four more similar cups in the foreground and one on a stone pedestal, all set against yellow castle-like buildings, green foliage, a paved ground, and a pale blue sky with the Roman numeral VI at the top.
42-seven-of-cups.png: A dark silhouette of a person stands before seven golden cups floating on gray clouds against a blue sky, with each cup displaying a different content: a gray head, a white sheet-like form with red rays, a green snake, a blue tower, colorful jewels with a chain, a golden wreath over a dark skull, and a blue winged creature, all beneath the Roman numeral VII.
43-eight-of-cups.png: A red-robed figure holding a staff walks away from eight stacked golden cups in the foreground, towards dark mountains and blue water under a yellow crescent moon with a face in a blue sky, with the roman numeral VIII at the card's top.
44-nine-of-cups.png: A man wearing a red hat and a striped garment sits on a wooden bench with crossed arms, facing forward, while nine golden cups are arranged on a blue-draped surface behind him, set against a blue curtain and yellow background.
45-ten-of-cups.png: An arch of ten golden cups with radiating lines spans a light blue sky above two adults with outstretched arms and two dancing children on a yellow-green ground, with a background featuring green hills, a river, trees, and a red-roofed house.
46-page-of-cups.png: A young man in a blue and red tunic with a blue hat stands holding a golden chalice from which a small fish emerges, set against a simple background of blue wavy water and a strip of yellow ground under a light sky.
47-knight-of-cups.png: A knight in silver armor with a winged helmet and a red tunic rides a light grey horse rightwards, holding a golden cup, against a landscape of brown hills, a winding blue river, green trees, and a light blue sky.
48-queen-of-cups.png: A crowned queen in a white and blue patterned robe sits on an ornate grey throne decorated with carved figures, holding an elaborate golden lidded chalice, by blue water with a colorful pebbled shore and a yellow cliff, under a blue sky.
49-king-of-cups.png: A crowned king, dressed in yellow, red, and blue robes with a golden fish pendant, sits on an ornate grey throne, holding a golden cup and a staff, above wavy blue water featuring a small fish and a distant red ship, all against a light background.
50-ace-of-swords.png: A white hand emerges from a grey cloud on the left, centrally holding a vertical light blue sword topped with a golden crown from which a green olive branch with red berries and a yellow streamer hang, surrounded by several floating yellow leaf-like shapes, with a distant landscape of brown mountains and blue water visible below, all against a pale sky.
51-two-of-swords.png: A blindfolded figure in a white robe and yellow slippers sits centrally on a grey stone bench, holding two crossed silver swords, with blue water and islands behind them under a light blue sky displaying a yellow crescent moon and the Roman numeral 'II'.
52-three-of-swords.png: The card depicts a large red heart pierced by three light blue swords, set against a light grey background with white stylized clouds and black diagonal rain lines, topped by the Roman numeral III.
53-four-of-swords.png: A recumbent yellow-robed figure rests on a yellow platform with hands clasped in the center, beneath three upright swords on a grey wall, while a fourth sword lies horizontally below the platform, and a colorful stained glass window with two figures is positioned to the left, marked with "IV" in the top right.
54-five-of-swords.png: A man in a green tunic and red sleeves stands holding two swords upright, with three more lying scattered on the grey ground at his feet, as two smaller figures walk away towards a blue body of water and distant hills under a light blue sky filled with wavy grey clouds.
55-six-of-swords.png: A man in yellow and blue poles a brown boat across blue water, carrying a yellow-cloaked figure, a small bundled figure, and six upright grey swords, with green-treed islands in the light blue distance.
56-seven-of-swords.png: A man in a red hat, patterned brown tunic, blue leggings, and red boots walks right, carrying five light-blue swords, while two similar swords stand upright behind him near colorful striped tents, all against a bright yellow background.
57-eight-of-swords.png: A blindfolded woman, dressed in red-orange and bound by white ropes, stands amidst eight upright light blue swords on muddy ground with blue puddles, while a gray castle with red roofs and hills are visible in the pale background, topped by the Roman numeral VIII.
58-nine-of-swords.png: A figure wearing a white striped nightgown sits up in an orange bed, hands covering their face, with a blue, yellow, and red patterned quilt draped over the bed, all beneath nine horizontally stacked light blue swords against a solid black background.
59-ten-of-swords.png: A prone figure, draped in red and light clothing, lies on brown ground pierced by ten silver swords, set against a background of blue water, a yellow horizon, and a black sky with a white 'X'.
60-page-of-swords.png: A figure wearing a brown and yellow tunic, yellow tights, and red boots stands on green, undulating ground, holding a silver sword vertically with both hands, against a light blue sky filled with white clouds and several small black birds.
61-knight-of-swords.png: A knight in grey armor with a red cape and plume rides a galloping grey horse across a yellow and orange ground, holding a silver sword aloft against a blue sky with white clouds and sparse green bushes.
62-queen-of-swords.png: A crowned queen with red hair, wearing a white, blue, and orange robe, sits on an ornate grey throne, holding an upright silver sword in her right hand and raising her left, set against a blue sky with white clouds, a flying black bird, and distant green and brown trees.
63-king-of-swords.png: A king with a gold crown, red cap, blue robe, and brown cloak sits on an ornate grey throne, holding an upright silver sword, against a light blue sky with white clouds, two birds, and small trees on yellow-green and brown ground.
64-ace-of-pentacles.png: A white hand emerges from a grey cloud, centrally holding a large yellow pentacle coin, above a vibrant green landscape featuring white lilies, dark green bushes with red details, a green archway revealing a blue mountain, and a yellow path, all against a light background.
65-two-of-pentacles.png: A man wearing a red pointed hat, orange tunic, red hose, and green shoes stands centrally, juggling two gold pentacles connected by a green infinity ribbon, set against a light ground, a blue sky, and a wavy blue sea with two ships.
66-three-of-pentacles.png: A man in yellow and blue stands on a bench holding a light object, facing a monk and a person in a patterned yellow robe holding a scroll, within a grey and black Gothic archway topped by three circular pentacle windows.
67-four-of-pentacles.png: A crowned man in dark and red robes sits with a yellow pentacle on his head, one held to his chest, and two under his feet, positioned centrally before a distant grey and yellow cityscape under a plain light sky, with "IV" at the top.
68-five-of-pentacles.png: Two figures, a man using crutches and a woman with a patterned shawl, walk across deep white snow with falling white specks, below a large, colorful stained-glass window displaying five yellow pentacles amidst green foliage and red berries, set in a dark, textured wall.
69-six-of-pentacles.png: A central figure in a red robe and striped tunic holds a golden scale in one hand while dropping coins towards two kneeling figures, one in yellow and one in blue, all set against a backdrop of green shrubs and distant buildings, with six yellow pentacles framing the upper portion of the card.
70-seven-of-pentacles.png: A man in an orange tunic, blue sleeves, and blue pants leans on a staff, observing a large green vine covered in six yellow pentacles on the left, with another yellow pentacle at his brown-booted feet on reddish-brown ground, against a background of purple and blue hills and a light sky.
71-eight-of-pentacles.png: A man with brown hair, dressed in a blue shirt, black vest, and red pants, sits on a wooden bench, meticulously carving a golden pentacle with a hammer and chisel; six more identical golden pentacles hang vertically from a wooden post to his right, and one lies on the ground, all set against a distant background of green hills and a small village, with the Roman numeral VIII at the top.
72-nine-of-pentacles.png: A woman in a yellow and red patterned robe stands centrally within a green vineyard filled with red grapes, surrounded by nine gold pentacles, holding a falcon on her gloved right hand, with a snail near her feet, all against a bright yellow background featuring distant trees and a building.
73-ten-of-pentacles.png: Ten yellow pentacles with black stars are arranged around an outdoor scene depicting an old man seated with a staff, a couple, a child, and two white dogs, all set before a colorful town with buildings, an archway, and a prominent tower under a bright blue sky.
74-page-of-pentacles.png: A young man in a red hat and green tunic stands holding a golden pentacle in a vibrant green field with small flowers, backed by a bright yellow sky, distant green trees, a brown plowed field, and blue mountains.
75-knight-of-pentacles.png: A knight in blue and gray armor wearing a helmet with a yellow plume rides a dark horse adorned with green foliage, holding a black-outlined pentacle disc in his outstretched right hand, set against a bright yellow sky and green and brown rolling hills.
76-queen-of-pentacles.png: A crowned queen in a red robe and green cloak sits on an intricately carved stone throne, holding a golden pentacle, against a yellow sky with flowering vines, a background of blue mountains and water, and a rabbit nestled in the textured brown and green foreground.
77-king-of-pentacles.png: A crowned king sits centrally on a dark, bull-adorned throne, dressed in green and red grape-patterned robes, holding a yellow scepter in his right hand and a yellow pentacle coin in his left, with lush green grapevines surrounding him and a distant grey castle under a yellow sky.
